name: Survivor Jones
short_description: Vertical Platformer, Jump, Swing, Fight, Survive! When you die your soul is absorbed by the magical skull! Collect coins, purchase booster cards, try again!
detailed_description:
Enjoy the FREE DEMO! - all feedback is welcome!
(CONTROLLER STRONGLY RECOMMENDED!)

You find yourself flying over a previously undiscovered island in the middle of the Bermuda Triangle. Suddenly your plane is struck by lightning!

Play as Jennifer Jones or Junior Jones. Rescue your sibling and find a way off the island!

This game is heavily inspired by 1981 Frogger. Leap for your life, collect coins, fight bosses, collect magical cards and die in terrible ways only to try again.

This game is currently being sold as a playable pre-alpha and will continue to be a work in progress until all 4 chapters of the game have been released. All further updates of the game will be included in the original purchase price.
